name: Method Classification review for Validity Conditions and Controlled Comparison Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The bundle classifies the new studies as model/workflow and evaluation-method evidence, not as a generic model leaderboard. Prompt-only, fine-tuning, DPO, multi-agent, IRT-aligned, and cognitive-prototype workflows are separated where the papers separate them.

findings.claim_or_issue: The proposed synthesis frames model choice as model/workflow sensitivity rather than a cross-task ranking of model families.
findings.why_it_matters: The included papers vary task, prompt, comparator, training, and evaluation design, so simple model rankings would overstate the evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the model/workflow wording in future literature-review revisions.
